label: Ollama (local)
notes: Point your app at http://127.0.0.1:17890/proxy/ollama instead of http://localhost:11434

label: LM Studio (local)
notes: Point your app at http://127.0.0.1:17890/proxy/lmstudio/v1 instead of http://localhost:1234/v1

label: vLLM (local)
notes: Point your app at http://127.0.0.1:17890/proxy/vllm/v1 instead of http://localhost:8000/v1

label: Groq (free tier)
notes: Send your Groq API key as a normal Authorization: Bearer *** it passes straight through.

label: OpenRouter (free models)
notes: Only meaningful when calling OpenRouter's :free model variants. Send your usual Authorization header.

label: Google Gemini (free tier)
notes: Keep your ?key= query param on requests as usual, it passes straight through.

label: Hugging Face Inference (free tier)
notes: Generic responses without a usage field are token-estimated rather than exact.

label: Headroom / Aphrodite (local context optimization)
notes: Points at local Headroom proxy from StackDeploy vendor/headroom. Compresses context/tool outputs before upstream LLM; use in addition to upstream endpoint.
